name: Dry Fruit Ladoo

ingredients.item: desiccated coconut powder (plus extra for rolling)
roasted rajgira (powdered, plus extra for rolling)

method: In a pan, combine all the ingredients and cook them on medium heat for 5-6 minutes, stirring continuously.
Once the mixture begins to leave the sides of the pan, transfer it to a plate and roll it into ladoos.
Roll the ladoos in a mixture of extra rajgira powder and desiccated coconut powder so that it has a light dusting of both.
